title: ExtendedHotbarRebared
description: Displays the bottom row of your inventory above your hotbar and allows swapping items between them
body:
the bottom row of your inventory will be shown above your hotbar. to swap items between them, hover over the slot and press r. to swap the whole row, hold shift and press r

[video](https://youtu.be/PbDAtSTAyb0)

history:
- 1.18-1.19.2 ([DeflatedPickle](https://github.com/DeflatedPickle/ExtendedHotbarRebared), Fabric)
- 1.11.2-1.16.4 ([DemonWav](https://github.com/DenWav/ExtendedHotbar), LiteLoader/Fabric)
